title: Homes & Living
cefrDescriptors: Can describe a home and the rooms in it.
Can tell the difference between a past habit/description (imparfait) and a past event (passé composé).
concept:
Now you have two past tenses, and the skill is knowing which one to use.

You already know the passé composé — it's for a completed event, something that HAPPENED:
  « L'année dernière, j'ai déménagé. » (Last year, I moved.)

The new one is the imparfait — it's for DESCRIPTION and HABITS in the past: how things were, what used to happen, the background:
  « Avant, j'habitais à Paris. » (Before, I used to live / was living in Paris.)

How to build the imparfait: take the nous form of the present, drop -ons, and add -ais, -ais, -ait, -ions, -iez, -aient.
  parler → nous parlons → parl- → je parlais, tu parlais, il parlait…
  avoir  → nous avons   → av-   → j'avais
One irregular stem to memorise: être → ét- → j'étais, tu étais, il était…

The contrast in one breath:
  « Quand j'étais petit, j'habitais dans une petite maison (imparfait — how things were). Un jour, mes parents ont acheté un appartement (passé composé — the event). »

The home vocabulary fits perfectly: l'appartement, l'immeuble (apartment building), la pièce (room), la cuisine, la chambre, le salon, la salle de bains, le jardin, le quartier (neighbourhood), plus déménager (to move house) and louer (to rent).

Don't stress about getting every choice perfect — for now, just recognising "description/habit = imparfait, event = passé composé" is the goal.

Describe where you lived when you were younger (imparfait), then one thing that happened (passé composé).

vocabulary.exampleFr: Il y a un grand salon.
La salle de bains est à droite.
vocabulary.exampleEn: The bathroom is on the right.

vocabulary.exampleFr: Quand j'étais petit, j'avais un jardin.
vocabulary.exampleEn: When I was little, I had a garden.
I'd like to rent an apartment.
Before, I used to live in Paris.

examples.en: Before, I used to live in Paris.

examples.fr: Quand j'étais petit, j'avais un jardin.
examples.en: When I was little, I had a garden.

examples.fr: La cuisine est petite mais le salon est grand.
examples.en: The kitchen is small but the living room is big.
